channel.title: All Registered Polls for the European Parliament
channel.description: All Registered Polls for the European Parliament

item.title: Opinion Poll by NMS for Novinky, 1–7 April 2026 – Seating Plan Projection
item.description:
Seating plan projection for the European Parliament
11 seats needed for a majority
Opinion poll by NMS for Novinky, 1–7 April 2026
Details on https://filipvanlaenen.github.io/czech_ep_polls/2026-04-07-NMS.html
